name: Squash Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Pierce the squash in several places with a sharp knife.
2. Microwave at high (100% power) for 3 minutes to soften the peel.
3. Peel and chop 3 cups of squash.
4. In a medium saucepan, melt butter over medium heat.
5. Add onion and ginger. Cook until softened, about 5 minutes, stirring constantly.
6. Add chopped squash, apples, stock, and thyme.
7. Bring to boil, reduce heat, cover, and simmer until squash is tender, about 20 minutes.
8. Remove from heat and puree in batches in a food processor or blender until smooth.
9. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
10. Serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley.
Or:
Cover and refrigerate until well chilled. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Garnish with parsley.
